# Harmony Types

This package contains types for Harmony application development in Typescript.

## Usage

*Note:* This package works within the context of a [Harmony application](https://console.harmony.a2z.com/docs/).

### Installation

Before running `npm install` to install this package, you first need to run `harmony npm` to get credentials that would allow you to download the package from CodeArtifact (aka Goshawk) repository.

```bash
$ harmony npm
$ npm install --save @amzn/harmony-types
```

### Usage

In your typescript file (\*.ts), add this on top of the file as follows,
```javascript
import '@amzn/harmony-types';
// Once imported, you will be able to use window.harmony object in Typescript Harmony application development.
```
